r(m)end,function(T,v)local r=O(v)local M=function(M,t,Q,P)return L(T,{M;t,Q;P},v,r)end return M end,function(T,v)local r=O(v)local M=function(...)return L(T,{...},v,r)end return M end,function(T,v)local r=O(v)local M=function(M,t)return L(T,{M,t},v,r)end return M end,{},function(T,v)local r=O(v)local M=function()return L(T,{},v,r)end return M end,function(T)local v,L=387495-387494,T[148448+-148447]while L do z[L],v=z[L]-(792110-792109),v+(-5307+5308)if z[L]==225699-225699 then z[L],y[L]=nil,nil end L=T[v]end end,function(T,v)local r=O(v)local
